programme.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Young Han Solo finds adventure when he joins forces with a gang of galactic smugglers and a 190-year-old Wookiee named Chewbacca. Indebted to the gangster Dryden Vos, the crew devises a daring plan to travel to the mining planet Kessel to steal a batch of valuable coaxium. In need of a fast ship, Solo meets Lando Calrissian, the suave owner of the perfect vessel for the dangerous mission -- the Millennium Falcon.

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
programme.desc: Former scientist Galen Erso lives on a farm with his wife and young daughter, Jyn. His peaceful existence comes crashing down when the evil Orson Krennic takes him away from his beloved family. Many years later, Galen becomes the Empire's lead engineer for the most powerful weapon in the galaxy, the Death Star. Knowing that her father holds the key to its destruction, Jyn joins forces with a spy and other resistance fighters to steal the space station's plans for the Rebel Alliance.

programme.title: Kingdom of the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Many years after the reign of Caesar, a young ape goes on a journey that will lead him to question everything he's been taught about the past and make choices that will define a future for apes and humans alike.

programme.title: CSN Mint - America 250 Coin Roll Collection!
programme.desc: CSN Mint presents 1776-2026 U.S. Mint coin roll offers honoring America's 250th Anniversary, including the Emerging Liberty Dime, Enduring Liberty Half Dollar, and P&D Quarter Roll Continuity.

programme.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
programme.desc: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

programme.title: 1776 Rare USA Gold
programme.desc: Own the 1776-2026 American 1oz Gold Buffalo featuring a Liberty Bell Privy mark, celebrating 250 years of the USA, and graded PF70UCAM. Struck from .9999 pure gold using the classic Buffalo Nickel design, it's one of the rarest releases this year.

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Cheryl wins two tickets to visit Hugh Hefner at the Playboy Mansion, she decides to take Dana instead of Jim.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim fears that Cheryl's romantic expectations will increase as Ryan (Mitch Rouse) showers Dana with gifts, until he learns a secret about a special tape Cheryl may have made.

programme.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

Knowing that her father holds the key to its destruction, Jyn joins forces with a spy and other resistance fighters to steal the space station's plans for the Rebel Alliance.

programme.title: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: Obi-Wan Kenobi (Ewan McGregor) is a young apprentice Jedi knight under the tutelage of Qui-Gon Jinn (Liam Neeson) ; Anakin Skywalker (Jake Lloyd), who will later father Luke Skywalker and become known as Darth Vader, is just a 9-year-old boy. When the Trade Federation cuts off all routes to the planet Naboo, Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan are assigned to settle the matter.

programme.title: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones
programme.desc: Set ten years after the events of "The Phantom Menace," the Republic continues to be mired in strife and chaos. A separatist movement encompassing hundreds of planets and powerful corporate alliances poses new threats to the galaxy that even the Jedi cannot stem. These moves, long planned by an as yet unrevealed and powerful force, lead to the beginning of the Clone Wars -- and the beginning of the end of the Republic.

programme.title: Star Wars: Revenge of the Sith
programme.desc: It has been three years since the Clone Wars began. Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi (Ewan McGregor) and Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker (Hayden Christensen) rescue Chancellor Palpatine (Ian McDiarmid) from General Grievous, the commander of the droid armies, but Grievous escapes. Suspicions are raised within the Jedi Council concerning Chancellor Palpatine, with whom Anakin has formed a bond. Asked to spy on the chancellor, and full of bitterness toward the Jedi Council, Anakin embraces the Dark Side.

programme.title: Malibooty
programme.desc: Three buddies (Brian Hooks, Sticky Fingaz, J.T. Jackson) leave their Arizona town and head to California for a wild beach party.

programme.title: The Extraordinary Journey of the Fakir
programme.desc: An Indian street magician travels to France to find his estranged father.

programme.title: Hollywood: No Sex, Please
programme.desc: Exploring how Hollywood has evolved to reflect society's changing attitudes towards sex over the decades, from "Basic Instinct" and "Body Heat" to "Mad Men" and "Sex and the City.".

programme.title: 101 Body Shocks
programme.desc: A tour of the human body from head to toe.

programme.title: My Big Boobs
programme.desc: Podcaster and body confidence advocate Jackie Adedeji meets women with big breasts to explore the growing issue living with larger breasts and the increased demand for reduction surgery.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: The life of Jamaican Robert Nesta Marley, known around the globe as reggae musician Bob Marley.

programme.title: True Dating Stories
programme.desc: Allie falls for a handsome pilot who lives in her building. But when he disappears Allie is left heartbroken until he shows up again. Dorian goes on a date with a girl who has a Jekyll and Hyde-like personality.

programme.title: True Dating Stories

programme.title: Beauty and the Bleach

Elvis Presley: Shook Up
programme.desc: Behind the glitz and glamour of rock 'n' roll royalty is the haunting tale of Elvis Presley; many question his moral fiber and notorious violent temper; devilish charm dressed in angelic white had friends and fans fooled for too long.

programme.title: David Bowie: Out of This World
programme.desc: Few artists marked the 20th century like David Bowie marked it. He was an astonishing and eclectic performer whose work brought a new dimension to the music scene and queer culture. Driven, fierce and always wanting to escape conformity, he was an outsider and was considered as a man from another planet.

programme.title: Reggie Yates' Extreme Russia
programme.desc: In Russia, Reggie Yates finds out what life is like for young gay people; in the U.K., Reggie discovers that, for young Black and Muslim LGBTQ+ folk, their harshest critics and persecutors come from their own communities, or even their own families.
